description.en: Build your company monorepo foundation for AI-assisted delivery: create an actionable memory-bank, define AGENTS.md workflow and rules, implement a reusable agent skill, and bootstrap the Next.js app with /internal-app and Milestone 2 logic integration.
description.es: Construye la base del monorepo de tu empresa para un delivery asistido por IA: crea un memory-bank accionable, define flujo y reglas en AGENTS.md, implementa una skill reutilizable de agente y prepara la app Next.js con /internal-app e integración de la lógica del Hito 2.

sharing.en: I just completed Milestone 4 — AI-driven Engineering with LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy. Check it out: https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/ai-eng-ai-driven-engineering #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #nextjs #typescript #ai
